description: High-fat, very low-carb diet designed to put your body into ketosis for efficient fat burning

keto_bacon_eggs_avocado.name: Bacon, Eggs & Avocado Plate
keto_bacon_eggs_avocado.description: Classic keto breakfast with crispy bacon, sunny-side-up eggs, and creamy avocado slices
instructions: Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 8 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
Drain most of the bacon grease, leaving about 1 tablespoon in the pan. Add butter and let it melt.
Crack eggs into the skillet and cook sunny-side-up for 3-4 minutes until whites are set but yolks are still runny.
Plate the eggs alongside the crispy bacon and avocado slices. Season with salt and pepper.

keto_cream_cheese_scramble.name: Cream Cheese Scrambled Eggs
keto_cream_cheese_scramble.description: Ultra-creamy scrambled eggs folded with cream cheese and fresh chives
instructions: Whisk eggs in a bowl with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over medium-low heat.
Pour in the eggs and gently stir with a spatula, letting curds form slowly.
When eggs are halfway set, fold in the cream cheese cubes and continue stirring gently until just cooked through.
Remove from heat, top with fresh chives, and serve immediately.

keto_sausage_egg_cups.name: Sausage & Cheese Egg Muffins
keto_sausage_egg_cups.description: Portable egg muffins loaded with pork sausage, cheddar, and bell pepper
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease a 6-cup muffin tin with butter or cooking spray.
Brown the pork sausage in a skillet over medium heat, breaking it into small crumbles. Drain any excess grease.
Whisk eggs with heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Stir in the cooked sausage, cheddar cheese, and diced bell pepper.
Divide the mixture evenly among the 6 muffin cups.
Bake for 18-22 minutes until puffed and golden. Let cool 2 minutes before removing from the tin.

keto_bulletproof_coffee_plate.name: Bulletproof Coffee & Ham Roll-Ups
keto_bulletproof_coffee_plate.description: Rich butter coffee paired with ham and cream cheese roll-ups for a quick keto morning
ingredients: 1 tbsp MCT oil or coconut oil
instructions: Brew a strong cup of coffee. Pour into a blender.
Add butter and MCT oil to the hot coffee. Blend on high for 20 seconds until frothy and creamy.
Spread about 1/2 oz cream cheese onto each ham slice. Roll them up tightly.
Pour the bulletproof coffee into a mug and serve alongside the ham roll-ups.

keto_mushroom_swiss_omelette.name: Mushroom & Swiss Omelette
keto_mushroom_swiss_omelette.description: Fluffy three-egg omelette stuffed with sautéed mushrooms and melted Swiss cheese
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté mushrooms with a pinch of salt for 4-5 minutes until golden. Remove and set aside.
Wipe the skillet, reduce heat to medium, and add butter.
Whisk eggs with salt and pepper. Pour into the skillet, tilting to spread evenly.
When the edges begin to set, place Swiss cheese slices and sautéed mushrooms on one half.
Fold the omelette over the filling, cook 1 more minute, and slide onto a plate.

keto_smoked_salmon_plate.name: Smoked Salmon Breakfast Plate
keto_smoked_salmon_plate.description: Silky smoked salmon with cream cheese, capers, and cucumber rounds
instructions: Arrange cucumber rounds on a plate in a single layer.
Spread a small amount of cream cheese on each cucumber round.
Drape smoked salmon slices over the cucumber rounds.
Sprinkle capers and fresh dill over the top. Drizzle with olive oil and a squeeze of lemon.

keto_coconut_chia_pudding.name: Coconut Chia Seed Pudding
keto_coconut_chia_pudding.description: Thick and creamy chia pudding made with full-fat coconut milk, topped with toasted coconut flakes
instructions: In a jar or bowl, combine chia seeds, coconut milk, vanilla extract, stevia, and cinnamon. Stir well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight, stirring once after the first 30 minutes.
When ready to serve, stir the pudding and top with toasted coconut flakes.
Add a splash more coconut milk if you prefer a thinner consistency.

keto_western_scramble.name: Western-Style Scramble
keto_western_scramble.description: Hearty scramble with diced ham, green peppers, onion, and pepper jack cheese
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Sauté diced ham, bell pepper, and onion for 3-4 minutes until the vegetables soften.
Whisk eggs with salt and pepper, then pour into the skillet over the ham and vegetables.
Stir gently with a spatula, forming soft curds.
When eggs are nearly set, sprinkle pepper jack cheese on top. Cover for 30 seconds to melt.
Serve immediately.

keto_almond_flour_pancakes.name: Almond Flour Pancakes with Butter
keto_almond_flour_pancakes.description: Fluffy low-carb pancakes made with almond flour, served with a generous pat of butter
instructions: Whisk together almond flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, beat eggs with softened cream cheese until smooth. Combine with the dry ingredients.
Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a non-stick skillet over medium-low heat.
Pour about 3 tablespoons of batter per pancake. Cook for 2-3 minutes until bubbles form on the surface, then flip and cook another 1-2 minutes.
Serve topped with remaining butter.

keto_egg_bacon_cheese_wrap.name: Egg, Bacon & Cheese Lettuce Wrap
keto_egg_bacon_cheese_wrap.description: Scrambled eggs with bacon and melted cheddar wrapped in crisp butter lettuce leaves
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet until crispy. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate and chop into pieces.
Pour off most of the bacon grease. Add butter to the same skillet over medium heat.
Scramble eggs in the butter until just set. Stir in chopped bacon and cheddar cheese.
Divide the egg mixture among the butter lettuce leaves. Add hot sauce if desired, and serve.

keto_chorizo_egg_skillet.name: Chorizo & Egg Breakfast Skillet
keto_chorizo_egg_skillet.description: Spicy Mexican chorizo cooked with eggs and topped with avocado and sour cream
instructions: Cook chorizo in a skillet over medium heat, breaking it apart with a spoon, for 5-6 minutes until browned and cooked through.
Make three small wells in the chorizo and crack an egg into each well.
Cover the skillet and cook for 4-5 minutes until the egg whites are set.
Top with diced avocado, sour cream, and cilantro. Serve directly from the skillet.

keto_spinach_feta_frittata.name: Spinach & Feta Frittata
keto_spinach_feta_frittata.description: Light and airy frittata packed with fresh spinach, crumbled feta, and sun-dried tomatoes
instructions: Preheat broiler to high. Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Add spinach and sauté for 1-2 minutes until wilted. Spread evenly in the skillet.
Whisk eggs with heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Pour over the spinach.
Scatter feta and sun-dried tomatoes on top. Cook undisturbed for 5-6 minutes until the edges set.
Transfer skillet to the broiler and cook for 2-3 minutes until the top is golden and puffed.
Let cool 2 minutes, slice into wedges, and serve.

keto_cobb_salad.name: Classic Keto Cobb Salad
keto_cobb_salad.description: Rows of grilled chicken, bacon, avocado, hard-boiled egg, and blue cheese over crisp romaine
instructions: Arrange chopped romaine lettuce on a large plate or shallow bowl.
Arrange the grilled chicken, bacon crumbles, avocado, and hard-boiled egg in neat rows on top of the lettuce.
Sprinkle crumbled blue cheese across the salad.
Drizzle with ranch dressing. Season with salt and pepper and serve.

keto_chicken_caesar_wrap.name: Chicken Caesar Lettuce Wraps
keto_chicken_caesar_wrap.description: Grilled chicken thighs with creamy Caesar dressing and parmesan wrapped in romaine leaves
instructions: Season chicken thighs with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until the internal temperature reaches 165°F.
Let chicken rest for 3 minutes, then slice into strips.
Divide chicken strips among the romaine leaves. Drizzle with Caesar dressing and top with shaved parmesan.
Roll up and serve.

keto_tuna_salad_stuffed_avocado.name: Tuna Salad Stuffed Avocado
keto_tuna_salad_stuffed_avocado.description: Creamy tuna salad with celery and mayo served in a halved ripe avocado
instructions: In a bowl, combine drained tuna, mayonnaise, diced celery, Dijon mustard, and lemon juice. Mix well.
Season the tuna salad with salt and pepper to taste.
Scoop a generous amount of tuna salad into each avocado half.
Serve immediately, or chill for 15 minutes for a colder salad.

keto_burger_lettuce_wrap.name: Bacon Cheeseburger Lettuce Wrap
keto_burger_lettuce_wrap.description: Juicy beef patty with melted cheddar, bacon, pickles, and special sauce in a lettuce bun
instructions: Form ground beef into a patty about 3/4-inch thick. Season both sides generously with salt and pepper.
Cook the patty in a hot skillet or on a grill over medium-high heat for 4-5 minutes per side for medium.
In the last minute of cooking, top the patty with cheddar cheese slices and cover to melt.
Mix mayonnaise and mustard to make a sauce. Spread onto the lettuce leaves.
Wrap the cheeseburger, bacon, and pickles in the lettuce leaves and serve.

keto_grilled_chicken_salad.name: Grilled Chicken & Avocado Salad
keto_grilled_chicken_salad.description: Tender grilled chicken over mixed greens with avocado, cucumber, and lemon-olive oil dressing
instructions: Season chicken breast with oregano, salt, and pepper. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Grill or pan-sear the chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Let chicken rest for 3 minutes, then slice against the grain.
Arrange mixed greens on a plate. Top with sliced chicken, avocado, and cucumber.
Whisk together remaining olive oil and lemon juice. Drizzle over the salad.

keto_broccoli_cheddar_soup.name: Creamy Broccoli Cheddar Soup
keto_broccoli_cheddar_soup.description: Thick and velvety broccoli soup loaded with sharp cheddar and a swirl of heavy cream
instructions: Melt butter in a pot over medium heat. Sauté onion and garlic for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Add broccoli florets and chicken broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 12-15 minutes until broccoli is tender.
Use an immersion blender to partially blend the soup, leaving some chunks for texture.
Stir in heavy cream and cheddar cheese over low heat until the cheese is fully melted.
Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot.

keto_antipasto_plate.name: Italian Antipasto Plate
keto_antipasto_plate.description: A keto charcuterie spread with salami, mozzarella, olives, roasted peppers, and olive oil
instructions: Arrange salami slices, mozzarella, and roasted red peppers on a plate.
Scatter Kalamata olives around the plate.
Drizzle everything with olive oil and sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve.

keto_egg_salad_lettuce_cups.name: Egg Salad Lettuce Cups
keto_egg_salad_lettuce_cups.description: Classic creamy egg salad with Dijon mustard and chives served in crisp butter lettuce cups
instructions: Place eggs in a saucepan, cover with cold water, and bring to a boil. Once boiling, cover and remove from heat. Let sit for 10-12 minutes.
Transfer eggs to an ice bath for 5 minutes, then peel.
Chop the eggs and place in a bowl. Add mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, chives, salt, and pepper. Mix gently.
Spoon egg salad into butter lettuce cups, sprinkle with paprika, and serve.

keto_buffalo_chicken_bowl.name: Buffalo Chicken Bowl
keto_buffalo_chicken_bowl.description: Shredded buffalo chicken over cauliflower rice with blue cheese crumbles and ranch drizzle
instructions: Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper. Cook in olive oil over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side.
Shred the cooked chicken with two forks. Toss with melted butter and buffalo sauce.
Sauté riced cauliflower in the same skillet for 4-5 minutes until tender.
Serve the buffalo chicken over the cauliflower rice. Top with blue cheese crumbles and a drizzle of ranch.

keto_chef_salad.name: Keto Chef's Salad
keto_chef_salad.description: Hearty salad with turkey, ham, Swiss cheese, hard-boiled egg, and creamy ranch
ingredients: 2 slices Swiss cheese, cut into strips
instructions: Arrange chopped lettuce on a large plate.
Roll the turkey and ham slices and place on the lettuce. Arrange Swiss cheese strips alongside.
Add sliced hard-boiled egg and cherry tomato halves.
Drizzle with ranch dressing, season with salt and pepper, and serve.

keto_shrimp_avocado_bowl.name: Garlic Butter Shrimp & Avocado Bowl
keto_shrimp_avocado_bowl.description: Succulent garlic butter shrimp served over spinach with sliced avocado and lemon
ingredients: 6 oz large shrimp, peeled and deveined
instructions: Melt butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add shrimp in a single layer. Season with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. Cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and opaque.
Remove shrimp from the skillet. Add spinach and toss just until wilted, about 1 minute.
Plate the spinach, top with shrimp and avocado slices. Squeeze lemon juice over everything.

keto_philly_cheesesteak_bowl.name: Philly Cheesesteak Bowl
keto_philly_cheesesteak_bowl.description: Shaved ribeye with sautéed peppers and onions, smothered in melted provolone over cauliflower rice
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté bell pepper and onion for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Push vegetables to the side. Add shaved ribeye to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring to break apart.
Season with salt and pepper. Lay provolone slices over the steak and cover for 1 minute to melt.
In a separate pan, sauté riced cauliflower in butter for 4-5 minutes.
Serve the cheesesteak mixture over the cauliflower rice.

keto_ribeye_steak.name: Pan-Seared Ribeye with Garlic Butter
keto_ribeye_steak.description: Perfectly seared bone-in ribeye basted with garlic herb butter and served with roasted asparagus
instructions: Remove the steak from the fridge 30 minutes before cooking. Pat dry and season liberally with salt and pepper.
Toss asparagus with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast in a 400°F oven for 10-12 minutes.
Heat a cast-iron skillet over high heat until smoking. Sear the ribeye for 4 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Reduce heat to medium. Add butter, garlic, and thyme to the skillet. Tilt the pan and baste the steak with the melted garlic butter for 1-2 minutes.
Rest the steak for 5 minutes before slicing. Serve with roasted asparagus.

keto_salmon_lemon_dill.name: Baked Salmon with Lemon-Dill Butter
keto_salmon_lemon_dill.description: Flaky Atlantic salmon fillet glazed with lemon-dill compound butter, served with steamed broccoli
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix softened butter with dill, lemon zest, and a pinch of salt to make compound butter.
Place salmon skin-side down on the baking sheet. Season with salt and pepper. Spread the compound butter over the top.
Squeeze lemon juice over the fillet. Bake for 14-16 minutes until the salmon flakes easily.
Meanwhile, steam broccoli for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp. Toss with olive oil and salt.
Serve the salmon alongside the steamed broccoli.

keto_pork_chops_mushroom.name: Pork Chops with Creamy Mushroom Sauce
keto_pork_chops_mushroom.description: Thick-cut pork chops seared golden and smothered in a rich mushroom cream sauce
instructions: Pat the pork chop dry and season both sides with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Heat 1 tablespoon butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear pork chop for 5-6 minutes per side until golden and cooked to 145°F. Remove and rest.
In the same skillet, add the remaining butter and sauté mushrooms for 4-5 minutes until browned.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds. Pour in heavy cream and stir, scraping up any browned bits.
Simmer the sauce for 2-3 minutes until slightly thickened. Season with salt and pepper.
Pour the mushroom cream sauce over the rested pork chop and serve.

keto_chicken_thigh_pesto.name: Pesto Chicken Thighs with Zucchini
keto_chicken_thigh_pesto.description: Crispy-skinned chicken thighs coated in basil pesto, served over sautéed zucchini noodles
ingredients: 2 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (about 8 oz total)
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Place chicken skin-side down and sear for 5 minutes until the skin is crispy and golden.
Flip the chicken, brush the top with pesto, and transfer the skillet to the oven. Roast for 18-20 minutes until internal temperature reaches 165°F.
While the chicken roasts, sauté zucchini noodles in butter over medium heat for 2-3 minutes until just tender.
Serve the pesto chicken thighs over the zucchini noodles. Sprinkle with parmesan.

keto_cauliflower_mac_cheese.name: Cauliflower Mac & Cheese
keto_cauliflower_mac_cheese.description: Roasted cauliflower baked in a rich three-cheese sauce until bubbly and golden
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Steam cauliflower florets for 5-6 minutes until fork-tender. Drain well.
In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add heavy cream, cream cheese, garlic powder, and mustard powder, whisking until smooth.
Remove from heat and stir in cheddar and gruyere until melted and creamy.
Place cauliflower in a baking dish and pour the cheese sauce over the top. Stir gently to coat.
Bake for 20 minutes until bubbly and golden on top. Let cool 5 minutes before serving.

keto_chicken_alfredo_spaghetti_squash.name: Chicken Alfredo Spaghetti Squash
keto_chicken_alfredo_spaghetti_squash.description: Roasted spaghetti squash tossed in a creamy parmesan Alfredo sauce with sliced grilled chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Cut spaghetti squash in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds. Drizzle cut side with olive oil and season with salt.
Place cut-side down on a baking sheet and roast for 35-40 minutes until tender. Scrape out the strands with a fork.
Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for 30 seconds.
Pour in heavy cream and bring to a gentle simmer. Stir in parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Add spaghetti squash strands and sliced chicken to the sauce. Toss to coat.
Serve garnished with fresh parsley.

keto_lamb_chops_mint.name: Grilled Lamb Chops with Mint Butter
keto_lamb_chops_mint.description: Tender lamb loin chops grilled to perfection and topped with fresh mint compound butter
instructions: Mix softened butter with chopped mint and lemon zest. Shape into a small log, wrap in plastic wrap, and refrigerate.
Rub lamb chops with olive oil, garlic powder, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
Heat a grill or grill pan over high heat. Cook lamb chops for 3-4 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Let rest for 3 minutes. Top each chop with a slice of the cold mint butter and serve.

keto_shrimp_scampi_zoodles.name: Shrimp Scampi over Zoodles
keto_shrimp_scampi_zoodles.description: Plump shrimp in a garlicky white wine butter sauce served over tender zucchini noodles
ingredients: 6 oz large shrimp, peeled and deveined
instructions: Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shrimp, season with salt and pepper, and cook 2 minutes per side until pink. Remove from skillet.
Add the remaining tablespoon of butter and garlic. Sauté for 30 seconds.
Deglaze with white wine and lemon juice, scraping up any browned bits. Simmer for 1 minute.
Add zucchini noodles and toss in the sauce for 2 minutes until just tender.
Return the shrimp to the skillet, toss to combine, and garnish with parsley and red pepper flakes.

keto_stuffed_bell_peppers.name: Keto Stuffed Bell Peppers
keto_stuffed_bell_peppers.description: Bell peppers filled with seasoned ground beef, cauliflower rice, and melted mozzarella
ingredients: 2 medium bell peppers, halved and seeded
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Place bell pepper halves in a baking dish.
Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat. Drain excess grease.
Add riced cauliflower, marinara sauce, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the beef. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
Divide the filling among the bell pepper halves. Top with mozzarella cheese.
Cover with foil and bake for 20 minutes. Remove foil and bake another 10 minutes until cheese is bubbly and golden.

keto_baked_chicken_wings.name: Crispy Baked Chicken Wings
keto_baked_chicken_wings.description: Perfectly crispy oven-baked wings tossed in garlic parmesan butter sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Line a baking sheet with a wire rack.
Pat wings dry thoroughly. Toss with olive oil, baking powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Arrange wings in a single layer on the rack. Bake for 40-45 minutes, flipping halfway, until crispy and golden.
While wings bake, combine melted butter, minced garlic, and parmesan in a large bowl.
Toss the hot wings in the garlic parmesan butter and serve immediately.

keto_meatballs_marinara.name: Italian Meatballs in Marinara
keto_meatballs_marinara.description: Juicy beef and pork meatballs simmered in sugar-free marinara, topped with melted mozzarella
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a bowl, combine ground beef, ground pork, almond flour, egg, parmesan, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Mix until just combined.
Roll the mixture into 8 meatballs. Place on an oiled baking sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes until browned on the outside.
Transfer meatballs to an oven-safe dish. Spoon marinara sauce over them and top with mozzarella.
Broil for 2-3 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly. Serve hot.

keto_taco_bowl.name: Keto Taco Bowl
keto_taco_bowl.description: Seasoned ground beef over shredded lettuce with cheese, sour cream, avocado, and salsa
instructions: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it apart as it cooks.
Add chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, and salt. Stir and cook for 2 more minutes.
Arrange shredded lettuce in a bowl. Top with the seasoned beef.
Add diced avocado, shredded cheese, sour cream, and salsa on top. Serve immediately.

keto_tuscan_chicken.name: Creamy Tuscan Chicken
keto_tuscan_chicken.description: Pan-seared chicken breast in a sun-dried tomato and spinach cream sauce with parmesan
instructions: Season chicken breast with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through. Remove and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium. Add butter and garlic, sautéing for 30 seconds.
Pour in heavy cream, add sun-dried tomatoes and parmesan. Stir until the sauce thickens slightly, about 3 minutes.
Add spinach and stir until wilted. Return the chicken to the skillet, spooning sauce over the top.
Serve the chicken with plenty of sauce.

keto_blackened_fish_tacos.name: Blackened Fish Tacos in Cheese Shells
keto_blackened_fish_tacos.description: Spicy blackened cod served in crispy baked cheese shells with cabbage slaw and chipotle mayo
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Form two mounds of shredded cheddar on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Bake for 7-8 minutes until golden and crispy. Immediately drape over a rolling pin to shape into taco shells. Let cool.
Mix paprika, garlic powder, cumin, chipotle powder, salt, and pepper for the blackening seasoning. Coat the cod fillet on all sides.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over high heat. Sear cod for 3-4 minutes per side until blackened and cooked through. Break into chunks.
Toss shredded cabbage with lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Mix mayonnaise with a pinch of chipotle powder for the sauce.
Fill cheese shells with cabbage slaw and blackened cod. Drizzle with chipotle mayo.

keto_bacon_wrapped_chicken.name: Bacon-Wrapped Chicken with Roasted Brussels Sprouts
keto_bacon_wrapped_chicken.description: Juicy chicken breast wrapped in crispy bacon alongside roasted Brussels sprouts with balsamic glaze
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Season chicken breast with smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Wrap the chicken tightly with bacon slices, tucking the ends underneath.
Toss Brussels sprouts with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet alongside the chicken.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until the bacon is crispy and the chicken reaches 165°F internal temperature.
Drizzle Brussels sprouts with balsamic vinegar and serve.

keto_cheese_crisps.name: Parmesan Cheese Crisps
keto_cheese_crisps.description: Crispy, salty parmesan crisps baked until golden — the perfect keto chip replacement
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place tablespoon-sized mounds of parmesan on the baking sheet, spacing them 2 inches apart. Flatten slightly.
Sprinkle each mound with Italian seasoning, garlic powder, and pepper.
Bake for 5-8 minutes until golden and bubbly. Let cool completely on the baking sheet — they will crisp up as they cool.

keto_guacamole_pork_rinds.name: Fresh Guacamole with Pork Rinds
keto_guacamole_pork_rinds.description: Chunky homemade guacamole with lime and jalapeño, scooped up with crunchy pork rinds
instructions: Cut the avocado in half, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Mash with a fork to desired consistency — leave some chunks for texture.
Stir in diced red onion, cilantro, jalapeño, and lime juice. Season with salt.
Serve immediately with pork rinds for dipping.

keto_fat_bombs_pb.name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Fat Bombs
keto_fat_bombs_pb.description: Rich no-bake fat bombs with natural peanut butter, coconut oil, and dark cocoa powder
ingredients: 2 tbsp natural peanut butter (no sugar added)
instructions: In a small bowl, combine peanut butter, melted coconut oil, cream cheese, cocoa powder, stevia, and sea salt. Mix until smooth.
Divide the mixture into 4 portions and roll into balls.
Place on a parchment-lined plate and freeze for at least 30 minutes until firm.
Store in the freezer and let sit at room temperature for 2-3 minutes before eating.

keto_celery_almond_butter.name: Celery Sticks with Almond Butter
keto_celery_almond_butter.description: Crunchy celery sticks spread with creamy almond butter and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt
instructions: Wash and trim the celery stalks. Cut into 4-inch pieces.
Spread almond butter generously into the celery grooves.
Sprinkle with flaky sea salt and serve.

keto_bacon_wrapped_jalapenos.name: Bacon-Wrapped Cream Cheese Jalapeños
keto_bacon_wrapped_jalapenos.description: Spicy jalapeño halves stuffed with cream cheese and wrapped in crispy bacon
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with foil and place a wire rack on top.
Mix cream cheese with garlic powder until smooth. Fill each jalapeño half with the cream cheese mixture.
Wrap each stuffed jalapeño half with a half-slice of bacon, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place on the wire rack and bake for 18-20 minutes until the bacon is crispy.
Let cool for 3 minutes, sprinkle with smoked paprika, and serve.

keto_cucumber_cream_cheese_bites.name: Cucumber Cream Cheese Bites
keto_cucumber_cream_cheese_bites.description: Thick cucumber rounds topped with herbed cream cheese and a slice of smoked salmon
instructions: Mix cream cheese with dill, lemon zest, and black pepper until well combined.
Arrange cucumber rounds on a plate.
Spread a dollop of the herbed cream cheese on each cucumber round.
Top each with a small piece of smoked salmon. Serve chilled.

keto_mixed_nuts.name: Keto Trail Mix
keto_mixed_nuts.description: Custom mix of macadamias, pecans, almonds, and coconut flakes with a hint of sea salt
instructions: Combine macadamia nuts, pecans, almonds, and coconut flakes in a small bowl or jar.
Sprinkle with sea salt and toss to distribute.
Portion into a small container or bag for an easy grab-and-go snack.

keto_deviled_eggs.name: Classic Deviled Eggs
keto_deviled_eggs.description: Perfectly hard-boiled eggs filled with a creamy mustard-mayo yolk mixture and dusted with paprika
instructions: Place eggs in a saucepan, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Cover, remove from heat, and let sit for 12 minutes.
Transfer to an ice bath for 5 minutes, then peel.
Slice eggs in half lengthwise. Remove yolks and place in a bowl.
Mash yolks with mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, apple cider vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pipe or spoon the yolk mixture back into the egg white halves. Dust with paprika and serve.

keto_pepperoni_cheese_roll.name: Pepperoni & Mozzarella Roll-Ups
keto_pepperoni_cheese_roll.description: Quick high-fat snack of pepperoni slices wrapped around mozzarella cheese sticks
instructions: Lay out pepperoni slices, overlapping slightly to form a strip.
Place a mozzarella stick at one end and roll the pepperoni tightly around it.
Repeat with the second cheese stick. Sprinkle with Italian seasoning if desired.
Serve immediately or pack for an on-the-go snack.

keto_greek_salad_chicken.name: Greek Salad with Grilled Chicken
keto_greek_salad_chicken.description: Crisp romaine with grilled chicken, feta, olives, cucumber, and tangy red wine vinaigrette
instructions: Season chicken with oregano, salt, and pepper. Grill or pan-sear in 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Let chicken rest for 3 minutes, then slice against the grain.
Arrange romaine in a bowl. Top with sliced chicken, feta, olives, and cucumber.
Whisk remaining olive oil with red wine vinegar and a pinch of oregano. Drizzle over the salad and serve.

keto_olives_cheese_plate.name: Marinated Olives & Cheese Plate
keto_olives_cheese_plate.description: A savory snack of herb-marinated olives with cubed sharp cheddar and salami slices
instructions: Toss olives with olive oil, Italian herbs, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl.
Arrange the marinated olives, cheddar cubes, and salami slices on a small plate.
Let sit for 5 minutes to let the flavors meld, then serve.
